ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the customer */,
  "personal_status" TEXT /* Personal status of the customer (e.g., single, married, divorced) */,
  "other_parties" TEXT /* Other parties involved in the loan application (e.g., guarantor) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Source of income (e.g., employment, self-employment, investments) */,
  "income_verification" TEXT /* Method of income verification (e.g., pay stub, tax return) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the employment record belongs to */,
  "job" TEXT /* Job title of the customer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the customer (e.g., employed, self-employed, unemployed) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the customer's employer */,
  "years_employed" INTEGER /* Number of years the customer has been employed */,
  "monthly_income" REAL /* Monthly income of the customer */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer's employer */,
  "employer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer's employer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residence" (
  "residence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each residence record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the residence record belongs to */,
  "residence_since" INTEGER /* Number of years the customer has been at the current residence */,
  "property_magnitude" TEXT /* Magnitude of the customer's property (e.g., real estate, life insurance) */,
  "housing" TEXT /* Type of housing (e.g., own, rent, free) */,
  "rental_income" REAL /* Monthly rental income of the customer */,
  "rental_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental agreement */,
  "landlord_name" TEXT /* Name of the landlord */,
  "landlord_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the landlord */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("residence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residence_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit report */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the report belongs to */,
  "credit_score" REAL /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "credit_history" TEXT /* Credit history of the customer */,
  "current_balance" REAL /* Current credit balance of the customer */,
  "average_credit_balance" TEXT /* Average credit balance of the customer */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit of the customer */,
  "credit_utilization" REAL /* Credit utilization ratio of the customer */,
  "payment_history" TEXT /* Payment history of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_reports_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer applying for the loan */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan applied for (e.g., personal, mortgage, car) */,
  "credit_history" TEXT /* Credit history of the customer */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan */,
  "employment" TEXT /* Employment status of the customer */,
  "income" REAL /* Income of the customer */,
  "credit_usage" REAL /* Credit usage of the customer */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the loan application was submitted */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the loan application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_applications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application the loan was issued from */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., personal, mortgage, car) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "repayment_period" INTEGER /* Repayment period of the loan */,
  "loan_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was issued */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date the loan matures */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES credit_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, cheque) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid, overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_payments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_scoring_model" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score range */,
  "credit_score_range" TEXT /* Range of credit scores (e.g., 700-749, 750-799) */,
  "credit_risk" TEXT /* Credit risk associated with the score range (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_score_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the credit score factor (e.g., payment history, credit utilization) */,
  "factor_weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the credit score factor in the overall credit score calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_credit_score_factors" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the credit score factor */,
  "factor_score" REAL /* Score of the customer for the credit score factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the loan officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the loan officer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the loan officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan assignment */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer assigned to the loan application */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the loan application was assigned to the loan officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_assignments_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES credit_applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_assignments_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("officer_id")
)
